MINI MINUTES: JPT: Robert Sheppard; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Walter Susor is present.
Attorney Michael Rossoff for the plaintiff.
Defendant James Marshall IS NOT PRESENT.
Attorney Patrick Hill for the defendant.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar; no appearance by defendant. At 2:04pm Mr. Hill told the clerk that his client was elderly and misunderstood that he needed to appear today at 1:30pm. Mr. Hill told his client on the phone he didn't not have to appear today. The trial date of OCT-03-2016 remains on calendar. (501)
